content: Rust-CUDA (Rust-GPU org, rustc_codegen_nvvm + cust) was dormant, rebooted Jan/Aug 2025. Compiles Rust to NVVM IR to PTX. Supports CUDA 12 and 13 (driver >=580 for CUDA13, needs LLVM 7.x). Windows supported via prebuilt LLVM download + PATH tweaks but fiddly. 100% community-driven, unpaid maintainers, README says 'expect bugs, safety issues'. CRITICAL: cust on crates.io stuck at 0.3.2 (Feb 2022); modern cust only via git dependency (issue #280), blocks publishing your own crate to crates.io.
